Title: The Orville
Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Adrianne Palicki, Penny Johnson Jerald
Plot: Set 400 years in the future, the show follows the adventures of the Orville, a not-so-top-of-the-line exploratory ship in Earth's interstellar Fleet. Facing cosmic challenges from without and within, this motley crew of space explorers will boldly go where no comedic drama has gone before.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 3 wins & 17 nominations total
